name: audit-pending-spec-fidelity recognizes vocabulary from backticked tokens in the architecture markdown per §25.2
command: mkdir -p pending/F-4-x arch && printf '## Phase F\n- **F-4** uses `custom_field` per the spec.\n' > arch/a.md && printf '%s' '{"name":"x","command":"echo custom_field: yes","expect":{"exit_code":0}}' > pending/F-4-x/c.json && bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/rubric/detectors/audit-pending-spec-fidelity.sh" --pending pending/F-4-x --arch arch/a.md 2>out.txt && grep -q 'fidelity_audit=clean' out.txt && echo ok 1>&2
